title: Asian Paints is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Asian Paints is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Asian Paints is actively seeking a talented and motivated Quality Control Engineer to join our dynamic team in Vadodara. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Asian Paints:
Asian Paints is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Asian Paints!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
